---
title: "Courses: BUS 1301 -- Managing with Data, Analytics, and Artificial Intelligence"
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/PieRatio
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-w-walker
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/robertwwalker

---

<marquee scrollamount="10"><h1><p style="color:purple;">{{< fa brands r-project  title="R">}}obertwwalker.github.io <br></p></h1></marquee>

## BUS 1301: Managing with Data, Analytics, and Artificial Intelligence

- [There is a course website.](https://robertwwalker.github.io/BUS1301-SP26/){target="blank"}

<iframe src="https://robertwwalker.github.io/BUS1301-SP26/" title="ESSSSDA Website" width="900" height="800"></iframe>
